title: Literature Timing-Support Audit
classification_reason: Escamilla et al. 2023 overlaps the retained structure-era timing window and reports a weak GP feature near z~2.3, but the table-level constraints near the retained peak are broad and zero-compatible, the binned peak-region values are unconstrained, and Pi_5 is unconstrained where the retained high-z shoulder would be tested.

primary_findings: The retained weighted-mean and peak regions overlap GP nodes z=1.5 and z=2.25.
The strongest retained-peak overlap is Pi_4=5.35 (5.82) for the GP w0-free reconstruction, with text noting a more prominent maximum near z~2.3.
The same region is too broad to treat as informative support, and the binned Pi_4 value is unconstrained.
Pi_5 is unconstrained for every case, so the retained high-z shoulder is not testable from the table product.

limitations: beta(z) is a scalar-field CDE coupling proxy, not a direct interacting-vacuum transfer variable.
The proxy can check whether structure-era bins are allowed or constrained, but cannot promote retained Gamma(a) as an IV/IDE prior by itself.
secondary_proxy.finding: Goh tables allow or constrain nonzero structure-era proxy coupling in some bins, but do not contradict the allowed-but-not-informative primary classification.

optional_target.reason_not_used: No table-level timing history or posterior product was available in the inspected paper/source. Using it would require author-provided data or figure digitization.

conclusions_changed: Retained timing is no longer merely awaiting literature contact; it has a completed coarse table-level audit.
The correct table-level status is allowed but not informative, not supported as a compression target.
A future likelihood-level or posterior-product prior test would require stronger numerical products than the tables used here.
conclusions_not_changed: No physical QFUDS source is established.
The retained branch remains failed for Level 1.5 physical promotion.
No CMB, matter-power, BAO, supernova, DESI, Euclid, Roman, or likelihood-level viability is established.
next_gate: Do not use retained timing as an informative IV/IDE prior unless posterior products, author data, digitized uncertainty bands, or a likelihood-level test show meaningful structure-era support beyond broad compatibility.
